steps.title: Understanding the solution requirement
steps.content: A point is a solution to the system if it satisfies both inequalities simultaneously. Since the choices are simple integers, backsolving is the fastest approach.

steps.title: Test (0,16) and (0,-16)
steps.content:
(0,16)
Substitute into the first inequality: $16 \leq 0 + 15 = 15$ is false, since $16 \gt 15$.

Fails.

(0,-16)
Substitute into the first inequality: $-16 \leq 0 + 15 = 15$ is true.

Now check the second: $-16 \geq -4(0) - 15 = -15$ is false, since $-16 \not\geq -15$.

Fails.

steps.title: Test the remaining alternative and confirm
steps.content:
(7,0)
  • First inequality: $0 \leq 7 + 15 = 22$ is true
  • Second inequality: $0 \geq -4(7) - 15 = -28 - 15 = -43$ is true, since $0 \gt -43$
Both inequalities are satisfied. That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
